completed_tasks.name: Root-cause analysis: chat→canvas whitelist mismatch and reply length constraints
Insert Phase 21 into ROADMAP.md with 6 plans and 9 success criteria
Add CC-01..CC-09 requirements to REQUIREMENTS.md, renumber DY/FR/CT/PG to 22-25

remaining_tasks.name: Run /gsd-plan-phase 21 to generate formal PLAN.md with 6 sub-plans

human_actions_pending.context: Phase 21 has been scoped but PLAN.md does not exist yet. The gsd-plan-phase orchestrator must create it.

decisions.decision: Insert Phase 21 before original Phase 22 (File Rendering)
decisions.rationale: Chat-to-Canvas reliability and conversational UX are blocking daily use and higher priority than file rendering.

decisions.decision: Use OpenAI-style tool calling for chat endpoint
decisions.rationale: Separates free-form markdown replies from structured canvas actions, removing dual prompt overlap.

decisions.decision: Use micromark + DOMPurify for markdown rendering
decisions.rationale: Lightweight, streaming-friendly, secure HTML output for chat messages.

decisions.decision: Single source of truth for canvas actions: src/prompts/shared.js CANVAS_ACTION_TYPES
decisions.rationale: Eliminates whitelist mismatch between server.js CANVAS_TOOL_TYPES and prompt module.

next_action: Run '/gsd-plan-phase 21' to generate the formal 6-plan PLAN.md for Chat-to-Canvas Reliability & Conversational UX.
context_notes: Full-chain inspection completed. Root causes confirmed: (1) server.js VOICE_ACTION_TYPES whitelist excludes 7 rich node types so normalizeVoiceActions silently drops create_note/plan/todo/weather/map/link/code; (2) three layers of short-reply constraints in chat.js prompts + JSON object mode + system prompt overwrite by action orchestrator cause terse replies; (3) no streaming in no-thinking mode; (4) textContent instead of HTML rendering in chat messages. User explicitly prioritized this above File Rendering. All planning docs updated. Ready for formal plan generation.
